plugin_desc: FiberHome OLT and GPON access-device SNMP child template. The template keeps the shared Access baseline only: MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB ifXTable 64-bit HC interface counters. FiberHome OLT private health leaves are not modeled in this pass because stable device-level CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power OIDs are not confirmed from the available FIBERHOME-OLT-COMMON-MIB signal. PON, ONU and optical service tables are not promoted to shared device-health metrics.
name: Access
